id.description: A UUID string identifying this signal report.

summary.description: New summary (the report's description) explaining what the report is about. The report's title + summary must stay under 8,000 tokens so the report remains embeddable — keep the summary a concise status view; detail belongs in the artefact log. Omit to leave the summary unchanged.

title.description: New human-facing title for the report. Omit to leave the title unchanged.
